sourcePrompt: A French-colonial rubber-plantation mansion, grander than a villa - two tall stories about sixteen meters wide. A wide columned veranda wraps the entire ground floor with a matching balustraded gallery above, a raised central entrance porch with double doors crowns a fan of steps, tall louvered shutters line both floors, and a red-tile hipped roof spreads over deep eaves. Whitewash and red tile, stately, opulent and faded.
